untranslatable_reason: Pattern requires visual identification of two similar narrow/pointed peaks and measurement of peak width/shape similarity. These geometric/morphological features cannot be expressed using only the allowed price-based indicators (OHLCV, moving averages, RSI, ATR, Bollinger Bands, MACD, ADX, Stochastic, Donchian, Pivots, Volume Ratios). Peak detection, peak similarity scoring, and wick-to-body ratio analysis would require custom pattern recognition logic not available in the allowed indicator set.
translation_notes: The Adam & Adam double top pattern is a visual pattern requiring: (1) identification of two peaks with similar shape/width, (2) measurement that both peaks are narrow and pointed (inverted V), and (3) confirmation on close below the trough line between them. While a simplified SHORT entry could use 'close below previous high', this does not capture the essential pattern requirements. The 72% success rate and 19% average decline suggest strong reversal characteristics, but the pattern definition itself is morphological rather than quantitative.
